title: Song of the Soul
overview: The film chronicles the journey of a rock star. Not only is he crazy about heavy rock music, but he also believes in a lifestyle of a rock star, somewhat wasteful and the rockstar takes up an assignment to host a television show and during the course of which a series of events ultimately transforms his life.
